name: Chilean Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1-2 tablespoons hot pepper sauce (such as Tabasco)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cilantro in a food processor fitted with the steel blade.
2. Turn on the processor and add the olive oil through the feed tube until a coarse sauce is achieved.
3. Add hot pepper sauce to taste, and salt if necessary. This makes a lovely substitute for red salsa.
